response.justification: The candidate lacks direct experience in embedded firmware development, Linux kernel modifications, or networking/security technologies critical for the role. While proficient in multiple languages and web/mobile development, their background does not align with the embedded networking security domain. Native Japanese proficiency is also not indicated.
strengths: Strong general software development skills across multiple languages (C, C++, JavaScript, TypeScript, D, etc.)
Experience with system-level programming and performance optimization in low-latency applications
Demonstrated ability to learn new technologies quickly and contribute to open-source projects
concerns: No explicit experience with C programming for embedded systems or UNIX software development
No mention of Linux kernel investigation, source-code modification, or networking/security technologies (MACsec, 802.1X, etc.)
No indication of native Japanese language proficiency, which is a strict requirement
